title: Fix Admin Panel link not appearing in navbar after login

requirements.summary: Add query invalidation after Internet Identity login to force admin status re-check
acceptanceCriteria: When the admin user logs in via Internet Identity, the Admin Panel link appears in the navbar without requiring a page refresh.
queryClient.invalidateQueries is called after the authenticated identity is set in useActor.ts.
The invalidation targets the isCallerAdmin query key so it re-fetches with the new authenticated actor.

file_operations.description: Add a useEffect that watches the identity object from useInternetIdentity and calls queryClient.invalidateQueries(['isCallerAdmin']) and queryClient.invalidateQueries(['actor']) whenever the identity changes from null to a non-null value (indicating login completion). This ensures the admin status check re-runs immediately after authentication without requiring a page refresh.

requirements.summary: Rewrite useIsCallerAdmin query with fresh approach using identity-derived principal in query key
acceptanceCriteria: useIsCallerAdmin uses the authenticated identity to create an actor and call isCallerAdmin().
The query is disabled (returns false) when the user is not authenticated.
The query key includes the principal string so it re-fetches on login/logout.
The query result correctly returns true for the admin principal and false for all others.

file_operations.description: Completely rewrite the useIsCallerAdmin hook: (1) obtain identity directly from useInternetIdentity, (2) derive a stable principal string from identity?.getPrincipal().toString() or null, (3) set enabled to true only when identity is non-null, (4) use the authenticated actor obtained via a direct createActor call with the identity rather than relying on the cached actor to call isCallerAdmin(), (5) include the principal string in the query key as ['isCallerAdmin', principalString], (6) set staleTime to 0 and gcTime to 0 so the result is never stale and always re-fetches on identity changes.

requirements.summary: Update Navbar to show Admin Panel link only when authenticated and admin check completes successfully
acceptanceCriteria: Admin Panel link appears in both desktop and mobile nav immediately after admin login without page refresh.
Admin Panel link does not appear for non-admin authenticated users.
Admin Panel link does not flicker during the loading state of the admin check.

file_operations.description: Overhaul the Admin Panel link rendering logic: (1) call useIsCallerAdmin and destructure data, isLoading, and isFetching states, (2) show the Admin Panel link only when isLoggedIn is true AND isLoading is false AND isFetching is false AND the returned data value is strictly true, (3) add a console.log statement (to be removed later) that logs the isCallerAdmin result and loading state for debugging, (4) ensure the same conditional logic applies to both the desktop navigation and the mobile hamburger menu so the link appears consistently across both views.
